summary: Frontend-only testing of Space Orbit educational app - NEW FEATURES. All major new features tested including Sandbox page routing, GPS Constellation toggle, Labels toggle, Speed slider. Fixed critical GPS constellation crash bug in EarthScene.jsx.

issues: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console (non-blocking, minor)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: GPS Constellation toggle crash - array index out of bounds when phase >= 1 in EarthScene.jsx line 307
Fixed: Missing null checks for geometry/material in constellation cleanup function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features verified working after bug fix: 1) Navigation shows 5 links (Learn, Explore, Sandbox, Quiz, Mission Log) 2) Home page 3D Earth with satellite glow effects 3) Explore page has all 5 sliders (Semi-Major Axis, Eccentricity, Inclination, RAAN, Speed), Labels toggle, GPS Constellation toggle (FIXED), color picker, preset buttons 4) Sandbox page at /sandbox with 4-step mission builder flow - recommendations show with 3D visualization 5) Learn page has Labels toggle in top-right 6) Quiz page with quiz grid 7) Dashboard with stats grid and orbit library 8) Hero CTAs navigate correctly

test_results.navigation_5_links: PASS - Learn, Explore, Sandbox, Quiz, Mission Log all visible and clickable
test_results.home_page_3d_earth_glow: PASS - 3D Earth scene renders with orbiting satellites with visible glow effects
test_results.explore_page_control_panel: PASS - All sliders present (Semi-Major Axis, Eccentricity, Inclination, RAAN, Speed)
test_results.explore_page_labels_toggle: PASS - Labels toggle in SCENE OPTIONS section works
test_results.explore_page_gps_toggle: PASS - GPS Constellation toggle shows 24 GPS satellites after bug fix
test_results.explore_page_color_picker: PASS - 7 color options work to change orbit color
test_results.explore_page_presets: PASS - 11 preset buttons load orbit parameters
test_results.sandbox_mission_builder: PASS - 4-step flow (mission type, coverage, latency, dwell) with recommendations and 3D visualization
test_results.learn_page_sidebar: PASS - Orbit sidebar with 11 orbit types
test_results.learn_page_labels_toggle: PASS - LABELS toggle in top-right of 3D scene
test_results.learn_page_lesson_content: PASS - Step navigation, key facts, prev/next buttons
test_results.quiz_page_quiz_grid: PASS - Quiz grid with 11 orbit quiz cards, 3 unlocked
test_results.dashboard_stats_grid: PASS - Total XP, Orbits Unlocked, Lessons Done, Quizzes Taken
test_results.dashboard_orbit_library: PASS - Shows orbit cards with LEARN/QUIZ buttons
test_results.live_ticker: PASS - Shows satellite data (ISS, GPS, Starlink, etc.)

gps_constellation_crash.issue: GPS Constellation toggle caused 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading x)' TypeError and WebGL Context Lost
gps_constellation_crash.root_cause: Array index out of bounds when co.phase >= 1.0 - Math.floor(co.phase * pts.length) could equal pts.length
gps_constellation_crash.fix: Added phase clamping to [0, 0.999] and index clamping with Math.min(satIdx, pts.length - 1). Also added null checks in cleanup function.
